description.value: You emanate waves of intense pleasure that cause all targets within range to falter. Affected creatures are stunned for 1 round and are staggered for the remainder of the spell. A creature that makes its save is staggered for the first round and can act normally thereafter. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game: Ultimate Magic.
